docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,681.18 FILED BY PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS AS TO DEFENDANT ENRIQUEZ, OSCAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-11-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2012 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS AS TO DEFENDANT ENRIQUEZ, OSCAR
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $116.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ENRIQUEZ, OSCAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-24-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ENRIQUEZ, OSCAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ENRIQUEZ, OSCAR $1,681.18 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,771.18, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ENRIQUEZ, OSCAR
